author: claude
content:
Recount done reproducibly from `gh pr diff 1140` (set difference on distinct set_preference NAMES):
- 33 distinct names removed (- lines); 7 distinct names added (+ lines)
- 6 of the added are removed-then-re-added unchanged (comment-only churn): app.update.url, browser.search.update, extensions.blocklist.enabled, browser.safebrowsing.provider.{mozilla,google,google4}.lists
- 1 added is the corrected typo name browser.safebrowsing.phishing.enabled
- NET removed = 33 - 6 = 27. Prose count "27" is CORRECT; Copilot's "26" is WRONG. Confirms the recorded #67 verdict.

Body breakdown inconsistency confirmed and fixed: the category list enumerated only 26 of the 27 net-removed prefs. The exact missing pref was browser.safebrowsing.phising.enabled (the typo'd name, genuinely net-removed). Fixed by adding a new "Safebrowsing" category for it; breakdown now sums to 27. Prose "27" left unchanged.

Actions taken (PR metadata + thread only, no code/commit/push):
- PR #1140 body edited (added Safebrowsing breakdown line; sum now 27)
- Copilot thread PRRT_kwDOATvC786K-l1S: rebuttal reply posted (https://github.com/openwpm/OpenWPM/pull/1140#discussion_r3448130309) + resolved (isResolved=true)

Ready to close. Leaving open for Stefan.
